types1:Item.types1:Name: SC-ETQAPIs
types1:Item.types1:Description: @scType=ETQ APIs to create validate and update, @application=ETQ System, @additionalText=Group of APIs from ETQ

businessConnector.name: SC-ETQAPIs
businessConnector.description: @scType=ETQ APIs to create validate and update, @application=ETQ System, @additionalText=Group of APIs from ETQ

field.description: Entire Response with token as XML
field.name: outResponse

action.label: View_AssignmentsETQ
action.name: View_AssignmentsETQ
action.description: View if the employee has already assigned the designated training.

parameter.description: Id to validate the current training
parameter.name: in_scVARVAL

parameter.description: page size to retry the information.
parameter.name: pagesize

parameter.description: Page number to retry the information
parameter.name: pagenumber

parameter.description: Valid token from ETQ Authentication API
parameter.name: in_scToken

field.description: Response from validation API from ETQ as XML
field.name: out_scResponseAssigments

action.label: CreateAssignmentPOSTETQ
action.name: CreateAssignmentPOSTETQ
action.description: ETQ API to assign a designated training.

parameter.description: Valid token from ETQ Authentication API
parameter.name: in_scToken

field.description: Response from ETQ system as xml
field.name: out_scResponsePostETQ

action.label: UpdateAssignmentPUTETQ
action.name: UpdateAssignmentPUTETQ
action.description: ETQ API to update the training into ETQ system.

parameter.name: in_scPayload
parameter.testWith: parameter.description: Valid token from ETQ Authentication API
parameter.name: in_scToken

field.description: Response from updated in ETQ as XML
field.name: out_scResponsePUTETQ
